programs.title: Living Large
programs.desc: 12-year-old Ben sings in a rock band and loves cooking.A real revolution comes in the boy's life when he decides to lose excess weight.Unfortunately, maintaining discipline is not easy.

programs.title: Summer School, 2001
programs.desc: Kien returns to Cheb in the Czech Republic, where his relatives run a stall at the market.His appearance changes the family's life.

programs.title: Wolfgang (extraordinari)
programs.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, nine-year-old Wolfgang (Jordi Catalán), an exceptionally gifted boy with features on the autism spectrum, is forced to live with his father, Carles (Miki Esparbé), whom he has never met before.An orderly nine-year-old who strives for perfection cannot stand his father's chaotic lifestyle.He wants to escape to Paris to study at the Grimald Academy and become the best pianist in the world.When Carles discovers his plan, he must make the most important decision in his life: follow his dream of an acting career or sacrifice his plans and become the father Wolfgang really needs.

programs.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programs.desc: After a painful separation, Bella and her lover can enjoy each other's company again.The teenager wants to be transformed into an immortal being, which will allow them to be united forever.Before that, however, he has to take care of more mundane matters - pass his high school leaving exams and get into college.In addition, he is worried about his friend Jacob.It turns out that soon he and Edward will have to join forces to ensure the safety of the girl who has won their hearts.The relative peace of all the bloodsuckers and werewolves of Forks is disturbed by disturbing news from Seattle.It turns out that mysterious murders are taking place there.People are being killed by a pack of vampires, spreading fear and destruction around.The gang is recruiting new members.It is headed by Riley.He was chosen as the leader by the vengeful Victoria, who is seeking Bella's life.Thanks to Alice's visions and the Cullens' vigilance, they manage to protect her.Enemy races unite in the face of danger.

programs.title: The Tourist
programs.sub_title: In the dew of Lethe's flood
programs.desc: A man (Jamie Dornan) traveling through the wilderness has an accident.His car is rammed by a tanker and he barely escapes with his life.When he wakes up injured in the hospital, he doesn't remember anything.He doesn't know what happened or who he is.He tries to use all the meetings with people and the clues he receives to discover his identity and past.He must do this before his enemies find him.A suspenseful, full of mysteries story of a man who faces amnesia and a dark past.

actor: Detective Inspector Lachlan Rogers - Damon Herriman
